summary: Iteration 151: Tested backup restore modes (merge/wipe), restore mode dialog UI, and payment conditions bug fix. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: restore mode dialog shows with correct data-testid attributes (restore-mode-dialog, btn-restore-merge, btn-restore-wipe, btn-restore-cancel), no window.confirm in BackupTab/DeployTab.
critical_code_review_comments: Other pages still use window.confirm: CommessaOpsPanel.js (lines 1394, 1447), RdpPanel.js (line 150), RilieviPage.js (line 105). Consider migrating these to useConfirm() for consistency and sandboxed iframe support.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 151 verified: 1) POST /api/admin/backup/restore accepts mode='merge' (upsert) and mode='wipe' (delete+import), invalid mode returns 400; 2) Frontend restore mode dialog has correct data-testid attrs; 3) BackupTab and DeployTab use useConfirm() not window.confirm(); 4) FornitoriPage and ClientsPage handleOpenDialog fetch full client details via GET /api/clients/{id} to preserve payment conditions. Note: Other components still use window.confirm - not in scope for this iteration.
verified_features: POST /api/admin/backup/restore with mode='wipe' deletes user data then imports
Default mode is 'merge' when not specified
Restore response includes: message, mode, total_inserted, total_updated, total_errors, details
GET /api/clients/{id} returns full data including payment_type_id, iban
Restore mode dialog visible with data-testid='restore-mode-dialog'
